methods.sourceDisplayName: 炽蛇军 TI-92 运兵车

provenance.excerpt: Players who complete the Mars Junction task "Purchase a MK1 Weapon from the Market" will be rewarded with an unranked Streamline mod.
Update 8.2 (2013-06-28) changed Streamline mechanics to be a linear reduction in cost.

It is possible to hit the hardcap of 175% Ability Efficiency thanks to Fleeting Expertise . All Ability Efficiency added beyond 175% is not represented on the UI, though may benefit channeled abilities if your duration is below 100%.
There is an unreleased Primed version that increases Ability Efficiency up to 55%.
